name: JetVelocity

layoutPattern.centerLeft: Large bold headline (2-3 lines, #dfe2eb, Space Grotesk)
layoutPattern.bottomLeft: Stat/feature badges in a row (colored tags)
layoutPattern.rightSide: Abstract visual element (glowing gem/crystal/icon in brand colors)

rules: No 1px solid borders for sectioning — use tonal shifts
Intentional asymmetry: heavy left typography, negative space right
Glass & Gradient: CTA gradient from #cc342d to #6f00be at 135°
Text must be legible at thumbnail size (300×157px)
